_notes: Swap/rollover cost in PIPS PER NIGHT charged by the backtest engine
(BacktestConfig.from_profile) for every UTC-day boundary a trade holds
across. All values ship as 0.0 = mechanism OFF until YOU fill real
numbers — invented financing costs would be worse than none.
Where to get real values (IC Markets): cTrader app > symbol info >
'Swap Long / Swap Short' (points per lot per night). Convert to pips
and, since this model is direction-agnostic, enter the WORSE (more
negative) of the two sides as a conservative floor, as a POSITIVE
pip cost here (e.g. swap short EURUSD -0.61 pips/night -> 0.61).
Known simplifications (documented in backtest_engine.py): one cost
for both directions, no Wednesday triple-swap.
Why it matters: H4 trades hold days (time stop allows 7 nights); at
FX PF 1.03-1.10 a real ~0.3-0.8 pip/night financing drag is capable
of flipping the book's sign. Filling this table and re-running
h4_yearly_stability is a pre-registered check on the FX book.
